name: List
description: Ordered/unordered list with Lumeo typographic styling.

api.name: List
api.description: Ordered/unordered list with Lumeo typographic styling.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: One or more ListItem elements, rendered inside the <ul>.

parameters.name: Bordered
parameters.description: Wraps the list in a rounded border and separates items with divider lines.

parameters.name: Hoverable
parameters.description: Highlights each ListItem on hover. Cascaded to items via ListContext.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Controls each ListItem's row padding. Cascaded to items via ListContext. Default Md.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <ul> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the <ul> element.

records.name: ListContext
records.signature: ListContext(bool Bordered, bool Hoverable, Lumeo.Size Size)

examples.title: Basic List
examples.code:
<List Bordered="true">
    <ListItem Title="Alice Johnson" Description="alice@example.com" />
    <ListItem Title="Bob Smith" Description="bob@example.com" />
    <ListItem Title="Carol White" Description="carol@example.com" />
</List>

examples.title: With Leading Icon
examples.code:
<List Bordered="true" Hoverable="true">
    <ListItem Title="Inbox" Description="12 unread">
        <Leading><DynamicIcon Name="Inbox" Class="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" /></Leading>
    </ListItem>
    <ListItem Title="Sent">
        <Leading><DynamicIcon Name="Send" Class="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" /></Leading>
    </ListItem>
</List>

examples.title: With Trailing Content
examples.code:
<List Bordered="true">
    <ListItem Title="Notifications">
        <Leading><DynamicIcon Name="Bell" Class="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" /></Leading>
        <Trailing><Badge Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Default">3</Badge></Trailing>
    </ListItem>
    <ListItem Title="Settings">
        <Leading><DynamicIcon Name="Settings" Class="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" /></Leading>
        <Trailing><DynamicIcon Name="ChevronRight" Class="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" /></Trailing>
    </ListItem>
</List>

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Extra content rendered below Title/Description, inside the item's main flex-1 column.

parameters.name: Leading
parameters.description: Content rendered at the start of the row (e.g. an icon or avatar), before the title/description.

parameters.name: Trailing
parameters.description: Content rendered at the end of the row (e.g. an action button or chevron), after the title/description.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Primary text, rendered as a truncating single line above Description.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Secondary text, rendered as a truncating single line below Title.

parameters.name: Href
parameters.description: When set, renders the item as a navigable <a> pointing at this URL instead of a plain <li>. OnClick still fires alongside navigation.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Makes the item clickable/keyboard-activatable (role button when not also an Href link) and raised on click, Enter, or Space.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Dims the item, removes it from the tab order, and suppresses Href navigation and OnClick.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the <li> element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the <li> element.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Makes the item clickable/keyboard-activatable (role button when not also an Href link) and raised on click, Enter, or Space.

mdSummary:
# List

Ordered/unordered list with Lumeo typographic styling.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Lists & Trees
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/list

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| List | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | One or more ListItem elements, rendered inside the \<ul\>. |
| List | Bordered | `bool` | `false` | Wraps the list in a rounded border and separates items with divider lines. |
| List | Hoverable | `bool` | `false` | Highlights each ListItem on hover. Cascaded to items via ListContext. |
| List | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Controls each ListItem's row padding. Cascaded to items via ListContext. Default Md. |
| List | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the \<ul\> element. |
| List | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the \<ul\> element. |
| ListItem | Context | `List.ListContext?` | `` |  |
| ListItem | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| ListItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Extra content rendered below Title/Description, inside the item's main flex-1 column. |
| ListItem | Leading | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content rendered at the start of the row (e.g. an icon or avatar), before the title/description. |
| ListItem | Trailing | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content rendered at the end of the row (e.g. an action button or chevron), after the title/description. |
| ListItem | Title | `string?` | `` | Primary text, rendered as a truncating single line above Description. |
| ListItem | Description | `string?` | `` | Secondary text, rendered as a truncating single line below Title. |
| ListItem | Href | `string?` | `` | When set, renders the item as a navigable \<a\> pointing at this URL instead of a plain \<li\>. OnClick still fires alongside navigation. |
| ListItem | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` | Makes the item clickable/keyboard-activatable (role button when not also an Href link) and raised on click, Enter, or Space. |
| ListItem | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Dims the item, removes it from the tab order, and suppresses Href navigation and OnClick. |
| ListItem | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the \<li\> element. |
| ListItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the \<li\> element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (List) — One or more ListItem elements, rendered inside the \<ul\>.
- `ChildContent` (ListItem) — Extra content rendered below Title/Description, inside the item's main flex-1 column.
- `Leading` (ListItem) — Content rendered at the start of the row (e.g. an icon or avatar), before the title/description.
- `Trailing` (ListItem) — Content rendered at the end of the row (e.g. an action button or chevron), after the title/description.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `ListItem`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`List.ListContext?`)
- `Density` (`Lumeo.Density?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<List />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-border`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/List/List.razor`
- `UI/List/ListItem.razor`
